# LnkFlow

Launching today

## Agentic click tracking that shows what grows your business

11 followers

## Agentic click tracking that shows what grows your business

11 followers

Visit website

Advertising tools

See which campaigns, channels, and collabs make you money! With reliable, server-side click tracking that counts the visits, ad blockers hide. Turn any URL into a short, branded link tagged by campaign, channel, or creator. Rank creators and platforms by who actually drove clicks, with bots filtered out by default. And it's fully agentic-ready: your AI assistant can create links, tag them, and pull reports in plain language — no dashboard required. Clean links in, clear answers out.

 Overview

 Alternatives
 Built with
 Team
 More [...] Full link tracking, clicks, and statistics on the server side, not on the client side, where ad blockers filter data, with a full influencer management tool that allowed us to find the real cooperations that worked.  
  
Meet LnkFlow - the solution that helps me, and is going to help you scale your business by actually understanding what brings in the money.

Using LnkFlow, I immediately understood what my money bought…

For example, big follower bases actually brought in a bunch of bot traffic, and of the 3 small content creators I collaborated with, one was responsible for 85% (!) of the clicks on my websites. I immediately stopped working with the other two and doubled down on the one that worked, and the results were amazing. [...] Overview

Cloud Computing Platforms

Server-side tracking at the edge is what makes LnkFlow reliable. Running on Cloudflare Workers lets us capture every click close to the user and count visits that ad blockers hide from client-side tools.

## Products used by LnkFlow

### Explore the tech stack and tools that power LnkFlow. See what products LnkFlow uses for development, design, marketing, analytics, and more.

Engineering & Development 1

DataFast

DataFastRevenue-first analytics

5.0 (2 reviews)

Website analytics

DataFast's revenue-first take on attribution shaped how we think about LnkFlow. We forward UTM attribution to it, so every click ties back to actual revenue rather than vanity metrics. Also, it helped us identify the gap: long, non-branded URLs drive less traffic. LnkFlow combines naturally with DataFast.
